children.text: to provide a private right of action to any person to enforce any provision of this section;
to create a cause of action against any institution of higher education or any employee of the institution for any civil liability; or

to affect (commonly known as the “Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act of 1974”) or the regulations issued under section 264 of the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act of 1996 ( note).section 1232g of this title42 U.S.C. 1320d–2
